message:
[rocketcursor-procurement] Send 2 test RFQ email(s) now.

Use the "RocketCursor Procurement" integration's send_rfq_emails tool with the emails array below.
Do NOT email suppliers. Send only to iansun258726@gmail.com.
User approved this send via rocketcursor (RFQ_DRY_RUN=false).

Run ID: smoke_test_v8

emails = [
  {
    "to": "iansun258726@gmail.com",
    "subject": "RFQ Request — GN2 pressurant tank",
    "body": "Hello,

We are requesting a quotation for the following component:

Item: GN2 pressurant tank
Quantity: 1
Candidate product: Empty High-Pressure Inert Gas Tanks - HP20
Part number: 7822A11
Supplier: McMaster-Carr
Product URL: https://www.mcmaster.com/7822A11

Required specifications:
{
  "fluid": "Nitrogen",
  "minimum_pressure_rating_pa": 6000000,
  "minimum_volume_l": 20,
  "compatible_with": [
    "Nitrogen"
  ],
  "notes": "Pressure rating should exceed max simulated tank pressure with margin."
}

Extracted candidate specifications:
Pressure rating: 13893425 Pa
Volume: 566.337 L
Minimum CdA: not found m^2
Fluid compatibility: Argon, Helium, Nitrogen
Oxygen clean: false
Cryogenic compatible: false

Requirement check:
Matched: pressure_rating_pa, volume_l, fluid_compatibility, compatible_with:Nitrogen
Missing: none
Failed: none

Please include:
- Unit pricing
- Lead time
- Datasheet
- Pressure rating documentation
- Fluid compatibility documentation
- Cleaning/compliance documentation where applicable
- Any minimum order quantity
- Shipping options

Note: This RFQ draft was generated automatically from a simulation-derived BOM and requires engineering review before purchase or use.

Best,
Engineering Team"
  },
  {
    "to": "iansun258726@gmail.com",
    "subject": "RFQ Request — LOX feed valve",
    "body": "Hello,

We are requesting a quotation for the following component:

Item: LOX feed valve
Quantity: 1
Candidate product: Stainless Steel 1-Piece 40 Series Ball Valve, 12 Cv, 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, SC-11
Part number: SS-45S8-SC11
Supplier: Swagelok
Product URL: https://products.swagelok.com/en/c/2-way-straight-pattern/p/SS-45S8-SC11

Required specifications:
{
  "fluid": "Oxygen",
  "minimum_cda_m2": 0.0001,
  "pressure_rating_pa": 2000000,
  "oxygen_clean": true
}

Extracted candidate specifications:
Pressure rating: 17236893 Pa
Volume: not found L
Minimum CdA: 0.0009600000000000001 m^2
Fluid compatibility: Oxygen
Oxygen clean: true
Cryogenic compatible: not found

Requirement check:
Matched: pressure_rating_pa, minimum_cda_m2, fluid_compatibility, oxygen_clean
Missing: none
Failed: none

Please include:
- Unit pricing
- Lead time
- Datasheet
- Pressure rating documentation
- Fluid compatibility documentation
- Cleaning/compliance documentation where applicable
- Any minimum order quantity
- Shipping options

Note: This RFQ draft was generated automatically from a simulation-derived BOM and requires engineering review before purchase or use.

Best,
Engineering Team"
  }
]

After the tool returns, reply in iMessage confirming each email was sent.
